details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest afternoon exhibition ticket under 20 for two adults
Task 2: Create 3-exhibition free family visit plan in next 7 days
Task 3: Register 1 adult and 1 teen for evening workshop under 60 total
Task 4: Add 3 highly rated postcards under 5 each to cart and set quantity to 1
Task 5: Make one-time 25 donation to Artwork Conservation Fund
Task 6: Purchase cheapest annual student membership under 60 and proceed to payment step
Task 7: Subscribe to gallery newsletter with topics and interests
Task 8: Book weekday morning wheelchair-accessible guided tour for 5 visitors
